variants.title: Filtrec D624G25V Pressure Filter
variants.description: Genuine Filtrec D624G25V. This Filtrec element is designed to meet or exceed the quality and performance of brand OEM’s ensuring superior filtration performance and long-lasting durability. Engineered with their high performance media and a durable design, the D624G25V provides reliable and consistent performance over its lifespan, even in harsh operating environments. When you order from FilterFinder, you can trust that you are getting a reliable and high-quality replacement filter that will keep your system running smoothly.
specifications: Style: Pressure Filter, Media: Glass Fiber, Efficiency 1: 20µ @ β200, Efficiency 2: 22µ @ β1000, Outer Diameter: 96.0 mm, Inner Diameter: 56.5 mm, Length: 986.0 mm, Δ Collapse Pressure: 25 bar, Seal Material: Viton, Temperature Range: -25 - +120°C, Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency , calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 20µ @ β200, Media Type: Glass Fiber, Flow Direction: OUT-IN, Collapse Pressure: 25 BAR, Seal: Viton

variants.title: Donaldson P566458 Hydraulic Filter, Cartridge Dt | Replaces the Filtrec D624G25V
variants.option1Value: Donaldson P566458 Hydraulic Filter, Cartridge Dt | Replaces the Filtrec D624G25V
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P566458 Hydraulic Filter, Cartridge Dt is engineered with advanced depth filtration technology, offering enhanced dirt retention and fluid cleanliness. It ensures optimal performance in high-pressure hydraulic systems, effectively protecting critical components from wear and extending system life. This filters robust construction and superior filtration efficiency make it ideal for demanding applications. Its reliable performance helps minimize maintenance costs and system downtime, ensuring consistent operation under tough conditions.

variants.title: MicroFit® UltraGen III MFHLP30969 Pressure Filter | Replaces the Filtrec D624G25V
variants.option1Value: MicroFit® UltraGen III MFHLP30969 Pressure Filter | Replaces the Filtrec D624G25V
variants.description: Genuine MICROFIT® UltraGen III MFHLP30969. Engineered and manufactured in Great Britain the MFHLP30969 is designed to meet or exceed the quality and performance of OEM quality standards, ensuring superior filtration performance and the longest possible filter life. Building on over 50 years of filtration expertise, the UltraGen III series is the third generation of MICROFIT® filter media, delivering exceptional efficiency and reliability. FilterFinder is an approved distributor of MICROFIT® filters. With expert product knowledge, dedicated support, and a large stock availability, FilterFinder ensures you receive the parts you need when you need them, every time.
